Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: hats [300046106], headgear [300209285], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Tall, cylindrical hats with a stiff brim usually slightly curved on the sides; worn by men, especially on formal occasions. For hats of the same shape that are collapsible, use 'opera hats.'

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Sombrero alto y cilíndrico con un ala almidonada, por lo general ligeramente curvada sobre los lados; es utilizado por los hombre, especialmente en ocasiones solemnes.
Hoge cilindervormige hoeden met een harde rand die licht gebogen is aan de zijkanten die vooral bij officiële gelegenheden worden gedragen door mannen.
圓柱形的高帽，帽緣硬挺，側邊通常微呈弧形；男性於正式場合使用為主的帽子。
Hoher, zylindrischer Hut mit steifer Krempe, im allgemeinen an den Seiten leicht geschwungen, getragen von Männern, insbesondere bei formellen Anlässen.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
